title: Community Resource Referral
text:
## Community Resource Referral

**Referral for:** {person}

**Requested support:** {adjective} help with housing, employment, and one confusing {object}.

**Immediate need:** {food}, bus fare, and a safe {place} before {number} PM.

**Strength observed:** Client {past-tense verb} {adverb} even while feeling {emotion}.

**Partner agency:** A {adjective} {job} at the {place} can {verb} the paperwork.

**Follow-up:** Case worker will call on {day of week}, bring {plural noun}, and avoid using the phrase just {verb}.
